$comment: ELSTER MCP Server - example config. Copy to config.json and fill in YOUR values. Any value can also be supplied via an environment variable (ELSTER_PFX_PATH, ELSTER_PASSWORD, ELSTER_TAX_NUMBER, ELSTER_STATE_CODE, ELSTER_NAME, ELSTER_FIRST_NAME, ELSTER_STREET, ELSTER_HOUSE_NUMBER, ELSTER_ZIP, ELSTER_CITY, ELSTER_COUNTRY, ELSTER_DOWNLOAD_DIR, ELSTER_SCREENSHOT_DIR, ELSTER_HEADLESS, ELSTER_EST_SKIP_EUR). Env vars take precedence over this file.

taxpayer.$taxNumberComment: Steuernummer in the format your Finanzamt issued it (with or without slashes).
taxpayer.$stateCodeComment: Two-digit ELSTER federal-state code of your Finanzamt. Look up the current code list in the official ELSTER documentation (https://www.elster.de). Example range: two-digit string like '11' or '90'.

ustva.$comment: Reverse-Charge supplier patterns (§13b UStG). region=EU -> KZ 46/47, region=NON_EU -> KZ 73/74. Vorsteuer always KZ 67. Patterns are case-insensitive JS regexes matched against contactName / description.
